title: verbascum shiqricum
intro: Verbascum shiqricum, also known as the Chinese mullein plant, is a species of flowering plant in the figwort family, native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and bronchitis, and improving respiratory function. In herbal preparations, Verbascum shiqricum is often used in teas, infusions, or as a dried herb to be added to other medicinal formulas.
